articles.title: India's power demand to rise by 5 to 5.5 percent in FY27: ICRA
articles.description: India's power demand is set for a significant rise of 5.0-5.5 percent in 2026-27. This growth will be fueled by industrial, commercial, agricultural, and household sectors. Emerging sources like electric vehicles and data centers will also contribute. Thermal plant utilization will stay steady. Distribution companies face challenges with high debt and muted tariff hikes, impacting their profitability.

articles.description: Vedanta's mega demerger has spun off four new companies, impacting dividend payouts for its 21 lakh shareholders.
